name: Emerging Development
tagline: Investing in our members so they can invest in the world — leadership begins within.
overview: The Emerging Development committee invests in the E100 member experience. From the New Member Meetup to the Brotherhood Friendsgiving, Super Bowl Party, and the Membership Retreat, ED plans the events that build brotherhood, celebrate membership, and keep the culture strong. You cannot pour from an empty cup — when E100 develops its members, it multiplies its impact.
